title: An AI start up's attempt to save more whales
description: The beached humpback whale “Timmy” moved people far beyond Germany and made headlines all over the world. But a much larger crisis usually remains invisible: the increasing death of whales on the world's oceans — caused by shipping, noise, climate change and fishing. An Australian company now wants to take countermeasures with the help of artificial intelligence.

title: How embedded systems enable AI in the real world | OPINION

title: Google in talks with SpaceX for space based AI data centre missions
description: Google and SpaceX are now pursuing similar ambitions in orbital AI infrastructure, with both companies exploring space-based data centres to support future artificial intelligence workloads.
content:
Alphabet-owned Google is reportedly in discussions with SpaceX and other launch providers for future missions tied to its orbital data centre initiative, Project Suncatcher, according to a Reuters report.

title: Amazon employees told use AI or else... they started faking tokenmaxxing
description: A report claims some Amazon employees are using internal AI tools for unnecessary tasks to increase AI usage metrics, as the company pushes wider adoption of artificial intelligence across teams.
content: Several companies have started asking their employees to use AI tools in their workflow, but it looks like when AI usage becomes a performance signal, workers find ways to game the system — and Amazon may already be seeing it happen. A report suggest... [2515 chars]

title: CBSE, NCERT Introduce AI & Computational Thinking Curriculum For Classes 3 To 8; Teacher Training To Begin In Summer Break
description: CBSE and NCERT have launched a new curriculum on Artificial Intelligence (AI) and computational thinking for students of Classes 3 to 8. Teacher training will be conducted during the summer break for smooth implementation. The government also plans to expand AI education to Classes 9–12 and add more Atal Tinkering Labs under NEP 2020.
content: The Centre has rolled out a new curriculum on Artificial Intelligence (AI) and computational thinking for students from Classes 3 to 8. The initiative has been jointly developed by the National Council of Educational Research and Training (NCERT) and... [1668 chars]
